description: MCP Filesystem Server tool definitions (reference only — NOT passed to model at inference time). These schemas define the target tools the specialist model is trained to call.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: Get a detailed listing of all files and directories in a specified path. Results distinguish between files and directories with [FILE] and [DIR] prefixes.

path.description: Path to the directory to list

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a file from the file system. Handles various text encodings.

path.description: Path to the file to read

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Recursively search for files and directories matching a pattern.

pattern.description: Glob pattern to match against file/directory names
